basic_details.job_title: Sainik School Korukonda TGT Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 21 days from publication in Employment News (11-07-2026)
important_dates.application to reach by: 21 days from publication in Employment News

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per Central Government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate with two subjects out of History, Political Science, Economics, Sociology and Geography OR Hon. Graduate with History or Political Science or Geography as main subject. Pass in CTET. B.Ed in relevant subject.
qualification.details: Graduate with two subjects out of History, Political Science, Economics, Sociology and Geography. OR Hon. Graduate with History or Political Science or Geography as main subject. Pass in the Central Teacher Eligibility Test (CTET) conducted by CBSE in accordance with the guidelines framed by the NCTE for the purpose. B.Ed in relevant subject from a recognized University / Institute. Desirable: Teaching experience of 2 years in CBSE affiliated English Medium School, preferably residential.

salary_details.details: Level-7 (Rs. 44900-1,42,400) in Pay Matrix NPS, LTC, Gratuity, Medical Allowance, Transport Allowance and subsidized schooling for two children as admissible as per Sainik Schools Society Rules & Regulation, 1997

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.sainikschoolkorukonda.org.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 11-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TGT (Social Science) post?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the TGT (Social Science) post at Sainik School Korukonda is 11-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the TGT (Social Science) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates with specific subjects or hold an Hon. Graduate degree, pass CTET, and possess a B.Ed in the relevant subject.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for the TGT (Social Science) post is between 21 to 35 years, with relaxation as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the TGT (Social Science) position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline by post to the Principal, Sainik School Korukonda, with all required documents and the application fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for OBC candidates is Rs. 500.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the TGT (Social Science) post?
faq.answer: The salary is as per Level-7 (Rs. 44900-1,42,400) in the Pay Matrix, along with other admissible benefits.

faq.question: Q7. What are the selection stages for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any desirable qualification mentioned?
faq.answer: Yes, desirable qualifications include teaching experience in a CBSE affiliated English Medium School, higher qualifications, computer knowledge, and achievements in NCC/Sports/Extra-Curricular activities.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Sainik School Korukonda: www.sainikschoolkorukonda.org.

faq.question: Q10. What documents need to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Copies of mark sheets, degree certificates, experience certificates, testimonials, and a Demand Draft for the application fee are required.
